hooks.command: FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCK: .env files contain secrets — edit manually' >&2; exit 2;; */bun.lock|*/bun.lockb) echo 'BLOCK: Lock files should not be edited directly' >&2; exit 2;; */package.json|*/scripts/download-claude-binary.mjs|*/scripts/download-codex-binary.mjs) echo '⚠️  WARNING: Touching binary version pin file. Confirm Claude 2.1.96 / Codex 0.118.0 are the intended targets — bumping the pin requires re-testing session resume (Claude) or the codex-acp bridge (Codex). See CLAUDE.md Environment Notes.' >&2;; esac

FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in */src/main/lib/trpc/routers/claude.ts|*/src/main/lib/trpc/routers/claude-code.ts|*/src/main/lib/claude/env.ts|*/src/main/lib/feature-flags.ts|*/src/main/lib/claude-token.ts|*/src/main/lib/credential-store.ts) echo '🔒 AUTH CODE EDIT — HARD RULE: Read docs/enterprise/auth-strategy.md §4.9 (env-var bearer injection FORBIDDEN), §5.4 (token-file pattern mandated via applyEnterpriseAuth helper), §3.1 (cluster lock-down prerequisite). Do NOT set ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN or ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS as env vars; use ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN_FILE=/path/to/0600/tmpfile instead. Do NOT store credentials in feature_flag_overrides. See .claude/skills/verify-strategy-compliance/SKILL.md for the full checklist.' >&2;; esac

FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; CONTENT="$TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING$TOOL_INPUT_content"; case "$FILEPATH" in */src/main/lib/credential-store.ts) ;; */src/main/*.ts) case "$CONTENT" in *safeStorage.encryptString*|*safeStorage.decryptString*|*safeStorage.isEncryptionAvailable*) echo 'BLOCK: Direct safeStorage calls are forbidden outside credential-store.ts. Use encryptCredential/decryptCredential from src/main/lib/credential-store.ts instead. Enforced by tests/regression/credential-storage-tier.test.ts.' >&2; exit 2;; esac;; esac

CMD="$TOOL_INPUT_command"; case "$CMD" in *'git push'*) cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/ai-coding-cli; test -f .claude/.tscheck-baseline || { echo '❌ BLOCK (pre-push): .claude/.tscheck-baseline missing — recreate with `bun run ts:check 2>&1 | grep -c "error TS" > .claude/.tscheck-baseline`' >&2; exit 2; }; if git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env($|\.)'; then echo '❌ BLOCK (pre-push): .env file staged — use SOPS or Kubernetes Secret instead' >&2; exit 2; fi; if git diff --cached -G 'apollosai\.dev' 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^\+.*apollosai\.dev'; then echo '⚠️  WARNING (pre-push): new apollosai.dev literal detected in staged diff — verify against F-entry catalog in docs/enterprise/upstream-features.md before pushing' >&2; fi;; esac

FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/ai-coding-cli && if command -v tsgo >/dev/null 2>&1; then CURRENT=$(bun run ts:check 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS' || echo 0); if [ -f .claude/.tscheck-baseline ]; then BASELINE=$(cat .claude/.tscheck-baseline); else echo "⚠️  .claude/.tscheck-baseline missing — create it with 'bun run ts:check 2>&1 | grep -c \"error TS\" > .claude/.tscheck-baseline' to re-establish drift tracking. Treating current count as baseline for this run." >&2; BASELINE=$CURRENT; fi; if [ "$CURRENT" -gt "$BASELINE" ]; then echo "❌ ts:check error count increased: baseline=$BASELINE → current=$CURRENT (+$((CURRENT-BASELINE))). New errors:" >&2; bun run ts:check 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | tail -10 >&2; elif [ "$CURRENT" -lt "$BASELINE" ]; then echo "✅ ts:check decreased: baseline=$BASELINE → current=$CURRENT (-$((BASELINE-CURRENT))). Consider updating .claude/.tscheck-baseline."; else echo "✅ ts:check baseline holding ($CURRENT errors)"; fi; else echo '[hook] tsgo not installed, skipping type check'; fi;; esac

FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in */electron.vite.config.ts|*/electron-builder.yml|*/electron.vite.config.*) cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/ai-coding-cli && echo '🔨 Vite/builder config edit detected — running build smoke-check (~45s, Vite must stay 6.x — see CLAUDE.md Environment Notes)...' >&2 && if bun run build >/tmp/vite-smoke-check.log 2>&1; then echo '✅ build smoke-check PASSED' >&2; tail -3 /tmp/vite-smoke-check.log >&2; else echo '❌ build smoke-check FAILED — recent config edit broke the build:' >&2; tail -20 /tmp/vite-smoke-check.log >&2; fi;; esac

FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in */src/main/lib/trpc/routers/*|*/src/main/lib/feature-flags.ts|*/src/main/lib/claude/*|*/src/main/lib/claude-token.ts|*/src/main/lib/credential-store.ts|*/src/main/auth-store.ts) cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/ai-coding-cli && echo '🧪 Auth/router/credential edit detected — running regression guards (~200ms)...' >&2 && if bun test tests/regression/ >/tmp/regression-guards.log 2>&1; then tail -5 /tmp/regression-guards.log >&2; else echo '❌ REGRESSION GUARD FAILED:' >&2; tail -20 /tmp/regression-guards.log >&2; fi;; esac

FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in */src/main/lib/trpc/routers/index.ts) cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/ai-coding-cli; ACTUAL=$(sed -n '/createAppRouter/,/^}/p' src/main/lib/trpc/routers/index.ts | grep -cE '^    [a-zA-Z]+: [a-zA-Z]+Router|^    [a-zA-Z]+: createGitRouter' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$ACTUAL" ] || [ "$ACTUAL" -lt 10 ]; then echo '[hook] router count parse failed, skipping drift check' >&2; else STALE=$(grep -lE "\b(2[0-2]|[0-9]) (routers|tRPC routers)\b" CLAUDE.md docs/architecture/trpc-routers.md docs/architecture/tech-stack.md docs/architecture/overview.md .claude/PROJECT_INDEX.md 2>/dev/null | head -5); if [ -n "$STALE" ]; then echo "⚠️  Router-count drift check: createAppRouter now has $ACTUAL entries. Files citing a smaller count that may need updating:" >&2; echo "$STALE" >&2; echo '   Run the trpc-router-auditor subagent for a precise diff.' >&2; fi; fi;; */src/main/lib/db/schema/index.ts) cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/ai-coding-cli; TABLES=$(grep -cE '^export const \w+ = sqliteTable' src/main/lib/db/schema/index.ts 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$TABLES" ] && [ "$TABLES" -gt 0 ]; then STALE=$(grep -lE "\b[1-9] (tables|Drizzle tables)\b" CLAUDE.md docs/architecture/database.md .claude/PROJECT_INDEX.md 2>/dev/null | head -3); if [ -n "$STALE" ]; then echo "⚠️  Table-count drift check: schema declares $TABLES tables. Files citing a table count that may need updating:" >&2; echo "$STALE" >&2; echo '   Run the db-schema-auditor subagent for a precise diff.' >&2; fi; fi;; esac
